category_sources: Official GitHub repository documents it as a traceroute implementation.
source_facts.description says fastrace is a dependency-free traceroute implementation in C.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named davidesantangelo/fastrace.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for fastrace.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/davidesantangelo/fastrace, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies traceroute and C implementation.
source_facts.executables lists fastrace as a CLI executable.
